job_summary: An Ethics Committee Coordinator manages the review and approval process of clinical trials to ensure ethical standards and patient rights are protected.
key_responsibilities: Coordinate Institutional Ethics Committee (IEC) / IRB meetings
Review clinical trial protocols and informed consent documents
Ensure ethical compliance and patient safety
Maintain ethics committee documentation and records
Communicate decisions to investigators and sponsors
skills: Knowledge of research ethics and regulations
career_path: Ethics Coordinator → Ethics Committee Manager → Regulatory Head
skills_required: communicate decisions to investigators and sponsors
coordinate institutional ethics committee (iec) / irb meetings
ensure ethical compliance and patient safety
